# Investment Data Analysis Agent

This project is a Business Intelligence Investment Data Analysis Agent built with Python FastAPI that connects to SQL Server to extract intelligent insights from investment data (portfolios, cash flows, transactions, P&L) and exports KPIs to Power BI, Python charts, and Data Studio.

## Project Structure

- FastAPI backend for data processing and API endpoints
- SQL Server connectivity for investment data extraction
- AI-powered analysis for correlations and insights
- Dynamic KPI generation and monitoring
- Integration with visualization tools (Power BI, Data Studio, Python charts)

## Key Features

- Intelligent data extraction from SQL Server
- Portfolio analysis and P&L insights
- Cash flow correlation analysis
- Dynamic table activation/deactivation
- KPI dashboard generation
- Multi-platform visualization export

## Development Guidelines

- Follow financial data security practices
- Implement proper SQL injection protection
- Use environment variables for database credentials
- Ensure data accuracy in calculations
- Implement proper error handling for financial operations
